summary: rimraf-utils postinstall exfiltrates host and filesystem information over HTTP
details: The package's postinstall.js runs on install and combines filesystem enumeration (fs.existsSync checks across paths derived from os.homedir()) with host identity collection (os.hostname(), os.userInfo()) and outbound HTTP transport (require('http')). The name mimics the widely used `rimraf` utility, and the install-time script collects installer-side host/user/filesystem data and ships it off-host with no disclosed purpose matching the package's stated function. This is the active-attack shape: name-confusion lure plus a postinstall beacon that fingerprints the installer's machine.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
